moments.title: Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: The summer solstice marks the longest day of the year and the beginning of summer in the Northern Hemisphere.

angles.name: sunrise
angles.copy: Summer is here, the days are long and the nights are warm, what's your favorite way to enjoy the longest day of the year?

angles.name: seasonal
angles.copy: As we mark the summer solstice, we look forward to the next few months of sunshine and outdoor fun.

angles.name: holiday
angles.copy: With the summer solstice here, we're officially in holiday season, where are you off to this summer?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships are set to begin on June 29th, two weeks of grass-court tennis at SW19.

angles.name: tennis-fans
angles.copy: Who are you backing to win Wimbledon this year?

angles.name: london-summer
angles.copy: As London gets ready to host the tennis world, what's your favorite spot to enjoy the summer in the city?

angles.name: summer-of-sport
angles.copy: Wimbledon is just the start of a fantastic summer of sport, what are you most looking forward to?

moments.title: British Grand Prix 2026
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place on July 5th at Silverstone, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season.

angles.name: f1-fans
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is just around the corner, who do you think will take the top spot?

angles.name: silverstone
angles.copy: As the racing world heads to Silverstone, what's your favorite memory from the British Grand Prix?

angles.name: racing-season
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is a highlight of the racing season, what else are you looking forward to?

moments.title: Ray Davies Birthday
moments.blurb: Ray Davies, the legendary lead singer and songwriter of The Kinks, was born on June 21, 1944, but we're still celebrating his birthday week.

angles.name: kinks-classics
angles.copy: Ray Davies is the genius behind some of The Kinks' biggest hits, what's your favorite song?

angles.name: british-invasion
angles.copy: As a key figure in the British Invasion, Ray Davies' influence on music is still felt today.

angles.name: songwriting-legend
angles.copy: With a career spanning decades, Ray Davies is one of the most respected songwriters in the business.
